productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Grey Sweater
description: Composition Grey ribbed round neck sweater made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring, dry clean or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Soft lambswool sweater from united colors of benetton for men. Crafted with exquisite attention to detail, this sweater has a narrow silhouette, perfect for the modern urban male. Wear it over a crisp shirt from arrow, corduroy trousers and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8' and shoulders 16"
